name: Hot and Spicy Beef Back Ribs
recipeInstructions:
1. Place each slab of ribs, meat side down, in the center of a double thick rectangle of heavy aluminum foil.
2. Sprinkle 2 tablespoons water over the rib bones.
3. Bring two opposite sides of the foil together over the top of the ribs.
4. Fold the edges over 3 to 4 times, pressing creases tightly each time. Allow some air space.
5. Flatten the foil at one end and fold it into a triangle shape, folding over several times toward the package. Press tightly to seal.
6. Repeat the procedure on the other end.
7. Place the packets directly over low to medium coals.
8. Place the cover on the cooker and cook for 1 1/2 hours, turning the packets every half hour.
9. Meanwhile, combine ketchup, remaining 1/4 cup water, lemon juice, ground cinnamon, hot pepper sauce, and crushed red pepper in a small saucepan.
10. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and cook slowly for 10 to 12 minutes.
11. Remove the ribs from the foil packets and place them on the grid over medium coals.
12. Broil for 30 to 40 minutes, turning and brushing with sauce occasionally.
13. Serve the remaining sauce with the ribs. Makes 8 to 10 servings.
